# Welcome to the neo.mjs community!

Hello everyone,

a big thank you for 76 Github stars since November 23!

To ensure that the current development (roadmap) is matching what you would like to see the most, please take some time and add feedback to the current ticket.

Feel free to use this topic as an introduction thread or jump into our slack channel (main readme).

Best regards & happy coding
Tobias
